displayTitle: Four Setups Every Level II Owns

beats.narration: Out of the case, a flaw detector is just a voltmeter with a screen. Standardization turns it into a measuring tool you own.

payload.title: OWN THE SETUP
payload.sub: From voltmeter with a screen to measuring tool.

beats.narration: Reject too low and small echoes vanish. Reject too high and the baseline lies. Set it per procedure — and write it down.
Angle beam follows a fixed order: exit point, then refracted angle, then range, then sensitivity. Geometry wrong means everything after is wrong.

payload.heading: Angle beam follows a fixed order

beats.narration: Special applications follow one rule: the block must match the part — curved surface, coarse grain, high temperature. And when surfaces differ, measure transfer correction.

payload.heading: One rule: match the block to the part

beats.narration: Standardize, verify on schedule, re-verify at the end. That is what makes your numbers worth signing.

payload.sub: That is what makes your numbers worth signing.
